label: Improved
items: Multi-ID is now interactive — for each plant the AI spots you can pick and confirm the right identity, tap any guess to see its info pills and description (with a "See full care" button into the full Care / Grow Guide / Companions / Light view), and tick the plants you want to add straight to your Shed.
Plant info across Multi-ID and the Companions tab now comes from one shared resolver — your library first, then the wider plant databases, and AI only when nothing else has it.
